plain_english_summary: Bounded-lossy motion archive and replay-evidence kernel for robotics telemetry, decoded search, and audit workflows.
commercial_wedge: Bounded-lossy motion archives with VLA token export, decoded PrimitiveIndex search, and 187× compression on real robot data. The ≤ 0.5° angular figure applies only to smooth-trajectory slices; discontinuities are not bounded and step inputs show Gibbs ringing. Red-team-tested adversarial surface. Public PyPI package today.
technical_wedge: Frozen wire-v1 motion transport codec. 187.1345× compression on lerobot real data. PrimitiveIndex search operates on decoded streams and FAST VLA export is committed. The ≤ 0.5° angular figure is limited to smooth-trajectory slices; step inputs are not bounded and show Gibbs ringing. B1/B2/B4/B5 gates pass. Narrow archive/search gate is ratified in proofs/narrow_claim/NARROW_CLAIM_GATE.json.
ideal_first_buyer: Robotics infrastructure team or simulation/replay platform
deployment_model: Public Python package — pip install zpe-robotics
not_claimed: General anomaly readiness beyond the declared threshold-selected holdout surface
Generally valid ≤ 0.5° angular-fidelity bound outside smooth-trajectory slices
family_position: Product candidate in the Zer0pa deterministic encoding family. ZPE-IMC is the umbrella integration layer.
